---
title: "MaxTemp Data Analysis"
author: "Izzi Bauerle"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---
```{r}
  library(FirstRPackage)  
  library(ggplot2)
  
  ggplot(MaxTemp, aes(x=Date, y=MaxTemp)) +
    geom_line()
```
We see that the daily max temperature in Flagstaff varies quite a lot.
